zh: 移除启动时的系统更新弹窗，避免窗口不可移动打断使用
优化设置窗口初始化，先显示界面再后台读取 API Key、开机自启动状态和宠物目录
增加设置窗口打开日志，方便定位后续卡顿原因
en: Removed the startup system update prompt so it no longer blocks interaction
Optimized settings startup by rendering first and loading API keys, startup state, and pet catalog in the background
Added settings-window diagnostics to help trace any remaining freezes
